params.name: trigger_id
params.description: Exchange a trigger to post to the user.

params.name: view
params.description: A [view payload](/reference/surfaces/views). This must be a JSON-encoded string.

items.docs: Open a view for a user.

params.name: user_id
params.description: `id` of the user you want publish a view to.

params.name: view
params.description: A [view payload](/reference/surfaces/views). This must be a JSON-encoded string.

params.name: hash
params.description: A string that represents view state to protect against possible race conditions.

items.docs: Publish a static view for a User.

params.name: trigger_id
params.description: Exchange a trigger to post to the user.

params.name: view
params.description: A [view payload](/reference/surfaces/views). This must be a JSON-encoded string.

items.docs: Push a view onto the stack of a root view.

params.name: view_id
params.description: A unique identifier of the view to be updated. Either `view_id` or `external_id` is required.

params.name: external_id
params.description: A unique identifier of the view set by the developer. Must be unique for all views on a team. Max length of 255 characters. Either `view_id` or `external_id` is required.

params.name: view
params.description: A [view object](/reference/surfaces/views). This must be a JSON-encoded string.

params.name: hash
params.description: A string that represents view state to protect against possible race conditions.
